summary: Therapist Schedule/Calendar System Testing Complete - All core features working. Fixed critical bug where available slots showed 'Unavailable' due to incorrect field name (slots vs time_blocks, start/end vs start_time/end_time).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in TherapistSchedule.js: Changed 'dayAvailability.slots' to 'dayAvailability.time_blocks' and 'avail.start/end' to 'avail.start_time/end_time' to match backend data structure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schedule component fully tested. Fixed availability slot display bug. All navigation, dialogs, and mobile responsiveness working.

calendar_grid_with_session_counts.notes: Calendar shows session count badges on dates with appointments (e.g., 19 has '2', 20 has '4', 21 has '1', 26 has '1')

today_button.notes: Today button navigates to current month and highlights today

jump_to_date_dialog.notes: Jump to Date dialog opens with date picker, Cancel and Go to Date buttons

click_date_opens_day_view.notes: Clicking a date navigates to Day View for that date

time_slots_24_hour_format.notes: Time slots shown in 24-hour format (08:00, 09:00, 10:00, etc.)

time_slots_range.notes: Time slots from 08:00 to 21:30 in 30-minute increments

scheduled_sessions_display.notes: Sessions show client name, time range (e.g., 15:30 - 16:30), and status (scheduled, completed, in_progress)

blocked_time_slots.notes: Blocked slots shown with red 'Blocked' label and X button to remove

available_slots_schedule_button.notes: Available slots show green 'Schedule' button (after fix)

navigation_prev_next_day.notes: Previous Day and Next Day buttons work correctly

back_to_month_button.notes: Back to Month button returns to Month View

dialog_opens.notes: Dialog opens when clicking Schedule button in available slot

date_time_display.notes: Shows date in DD/MM/YYYY format and time in 24-hour format (e.g., '21/01/2026 at 09:00')

dialog_opens.notes: Block Time dialog opens when clicking Block Time button

start_end_time_inputs.notes: Start Time and End Time inputs when not blocking entire day

reason_field.notes: Reason field with placeholder 'e.g., Personal time, Holiday'

cancel_block_buttons.notes: Cancel and Block Time buttons present

month_view_mobile.notes: Calendar grid displays correctly on 375px viewport

day_view_mobile.notes: Day view displays correctly with time slots and Schedule buttons

navigation_mobile.notes: All navigation buttons (prev/next day, back to month, jump to date) visible and functional

hamburger_menu.notes: Hamburger menu visible and functional on mobile

bugs_fixed.issue: Available slots showed 'Unavailable' instead of 'Schedule' button
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Code was looking for 'dayAvailability.slots' but backend returns 'dayAvailability.time_blocks'. Also 'avail.start/end' should be 'avail.start_time/end_time'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed line 189 from 'dayAvailability.slots' to 'dayAvailability.time_blocks' and lines 191-192 from 'avail.start/end' to 'avail.start_time/end_time'
